{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005044F0DBC3F5B6C93895659E"}"},"total":533},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7269624195091464994","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比外面那堆模版化小说好看许多，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692591330,"group_id":"7266095601807264828","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5nwftaxrUW2op7QYgiBsUHvNDOi09qP65BS5KZPuuXW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2585677673017552","user_name":"用户25856776"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2585677673017552","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7266095601807264828","book_info":{"abstract":"苏时穿越大乾盛世，成为侯府的二少爷！
只是，这二少爷空有一身好皮囊，却不学无术，活脱脱的京都一恶少。
开局就被退婚，所有人都在等着看笑话，苏时表示无所吊谓。
随口吟诵了一首诗，却不料惊动了整个京都。
苏时微微一笑，不就是做诗词文章么？
我会的可不仅仅是这玩意儿。
原本只想逍遥快活一辈子的苏时，随便捣鼓了几下，这个世界就诞生了许多新奇的玩意儿。
甚至，还一不小心成为了大乾隐藏的首富。
“皇上，有外族入侵！”
“宣苏时！”
“皇上，北边遭受了重大雪灾！”
“宣苏时！”
“皇上，三公主已及笄！”
“哦，那就将三公主许配给苏时！”
苏时惊呆了：“这老丈人怕是在打我那些银子的主意吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/253d8bfc01633c4e15184126f8de925e","author":"圆月之下","author_id":"","book_id":"7266095601807264828","book_name":"侯门贵公子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7267229938837621801","read_count":"10691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"976471"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"471","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0976f0ea13171cced8228065b6758b76~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468645&x-signature=r%2FY%2FQs%2BRQy8GOHx8QKo4JkvJL%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.933605e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005044F0DBC3F5B6C93895659E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4933,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":13430},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":
